title: Motion-ready layered background
prompt: Create a 16:9 motion-ready layered background for TSI 2.0. Light premium base with separate-feeling foreground, midground, and background layers: soft white, cool blue tint, TSI dark blue #001E41 hairline grids, TSI bright blue #4396F6 signal arcs, and subtle warm-neutral depth. Abstract, elegant, spacious, designed so UI or text can animate over it. No readable text, no logos, no data, no people, no watermarks. Leave upper-left logo-safe space and broad copy-safe area. Premium OpenAI-inspired subtle gradient atmosphere but brand-derived and restrained.
notes: Subtle atmospheric layer for animated HTML or product visuals.
package_asset_policy: full-resolution PNG omitted from compact package; use bundled WebP preview for visual reference and regenerate from prompt metadata for production use.
